title: eschscholzia californica var. compacta
intro: Eschscholzia californica var. compacta, commonly known as the compact California poppy or dwarf California poppy, is a variety of the California poppy plant (Eschscholzia californica) that has smaller flowers and a more compact growth habit. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and relieve pain. The health benefits of Eschscholzia californica var. compacta include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural sedative. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
